leadText: A Rowap Berry (Japanese: レンブのみ Renbu Fruit) is a type of Berry introduced in Generation IV.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Held item [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokémon holds a Rowap Berry and is hit by a special attack , the attacker will lose 1/8 of its max HP . If the holder has Ripen , the attacker will instead lose 1/4 of its maximum HP. Ingredient [ edit | edit source ] Berry Blending OR AS Rowap Berries are blue Berries that have a high chance of producing a Pokéblock +. Poffin Cooking D P Pt BD SP When used alone, Rowap Berries will produce Poffins with Sourness 29, Spiciness 9 and smoothness 59 when cooked in 1 minute with no spills or burns. Ice Cream Scoop DW Flavor 1 Flavor 2 Flavor 3 Easy to scoop Stickiness Juice Shoppe X Y Rowap Berries are blue Berries in Group 3. Composting X Y Rowap Berries are blue Berries. Curry Sw Sh Rowap Berries have a rarity of 20. Cram-o-matic Sw Sh Rowap Berries are Dark-type items and give 6 points towards the output value.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods D P Pt Event HG SS Event B W B2 W2 Transfer from Dream World DW * Given to players who ranked in the second 2013 International Challenge Wi-Fi tournament for Black 2 and White 2 . It took place between March 22 to 25, 2013. X Y OR AS Transfer from PokéMileage Club PMC * Poké Doll Grabber (Lv. 2) S M US UM Event Sw Sh CT Berry trees ( Giant's Bed ) Spectrier and Glastrier Max Raid Battle (October 21 to 23, 2022) BD SP Ramanas Park (Stratospheric Room) Pastoria City S V TM Ogre Oustin' Distribution [ edit | edit source ] Games Event Language/Region Distribution period S M US UM Pokémon Global Link gift rare Berries All January 7, 2019 September 2, 2019 As a held item [ edit | edit source ] Games Event Language/Region Distribution period D P Pt Cinema Arceus Japanese July 5, 2009 July 11 to 12, 2009 July 18 to September 30, 2009 Toys "R" Us Arceus United States, Puerto Rico November 7 to 15, 2009 Cinema Arceus Korean December 24, 2009 to January 31, 2010 Michina Arceus All Various D P Pt HG SS Crown Beasts Suicune Japanese June 18 to August 31, 2010 Crown City Suicune Korean December 16, 2010 to January 9, 2011 GameStop Suicune United States, Canada January 31 to February 6, 2011 Winter 2011 Suicune All February 21 to 27, 2011

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt A Poffin ingredient. If held by a Pokémon, and if a foe's special attack lands, the foe also takes damage. HG SS If held by a Pokémon and a foe's special attack lands, the foe also takes damage. B W B2 W2 If held by a Pokémon and a special attack lands, the attacker also takes damage. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA A Berry to be consumed by Pokémon. If a special attack hits the Pokémon holding it, the attacker will also be hurt. S V If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a special move, the attacker will also take damage. Tag information [ edit | edit source ] No. 64 Size: 2.0" (5.2 cm) Firmness: Very soft Games Description D P Pt BD SP In days of old, people worked the top-shaped pieces of this Berry free and used them as toys. Curry information [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh A very rare Berry. It's so sour that it could make people cry, so you need to use it little by little by dividing it into small pieces.

A growing Rowap plant's soil dries by 7% every hour, fully drying out in 15 hours. Generation V Planted 0 hours Sprouted 36 hours Taller 72 hours Flowering 108 hours Berries 144 hours A Rowap plant will yield ? Berries. Generation VI Pokémon X and Y Planted 0 hours Sprouted 12 hours Growing 24 hours Bigger 36 hours Budding 48 hours Bloom 60 hours Berries 72 hours A Rowap plant will yield 1-5 Berries. During its growth, watering the plant adds 0.2 Berries to the final harvest, weeding it adds 0.1, and removing a pest adds 0.2. Rowap plants attract Volbeat as pests. Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire Planted 0 hours Sprouted 12 hours Taller 24 hours Flowering 36 hours Berries 48 hours A Rowap plant will yield 1-13 Berries. Generation VII Pokémon Sun, Moon, Ultra Sun, and Ultra Moon Planted 0 hours Sprouted 54 hours Taller 60 hours Flowering 68 hours Berries 72 hours A Rowap plant will yield 2 Berries if Isle Aplenny is at Phase 1, 4 Berries if it is at Phase 2, and 7 Berries if it is at Phase 3. Generation VIII Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl Planted 0 hours Sprouted 24 hours Taller 48 hours Flowering 72 hours Berries 96 hours A Rowap plant will yield 2-5 Berries.
